place: Vista del Mar, Nai Thon, Phuket, Thailand
title: Vista del Mar — Hillside Sunset-View Villa
blurb: A contemporary hillside villa at Vista del Mar, perched ~52 m above Nai Thon with uninterrupted sunset panoramas over the Andaman Sea — an infinity-edge pool, full-height glass and a calm, forest-framed setting within a gated estate.
detail:
A contemporary hillside villa at Vista del Mar, conceived as a serene private retreat overlooking the emerald canopy of Nai Thon and the vast Andaman Sea. Positioned on the western slope above one of Phuket's most untouched beaches, the residence opens to uninterrupted sunset views and a soothing natural landscape shaped by the surrounding national park. From its elevated vantage point — roughly 52 metres above sea level — sea, sky and forest meet in a single panoramic frame.

Clean geometric lines, expansive glass façades and an effortless indoor–outdoor flow define the architecture. Across approximately 630 m² over two levels, the open-plan living and dining area is finished in soft neutral palettes and warm natural textures, with full-height sliding doors that let the sea view set the mood of the home. The main living pavilion opens directly onto a spacious terrace and an infinity-edge pool — a tranquil space for open-air dining, quiet mornings and sunset gatherings.

The villa offers five serene bedroom suites, each an intimate haven with walk-in wardrobes, generous bathrooms and wide windows framing either the gardens or the sea; the master suite enjoys direct terrace access and its own sunset panorama. Delivered fully finished with fitted kitchen, bathrooms and built-in elements, the home sits within Vista del Mar — a private, low-density estate of 17,000 m² with 24-hour security, on-site management and concierge services, just 600 metres above the pristine one-kilometre bay of Nai Thon Beach.
